notes: Roman elite known from letters of Libanius and Symmachus, associated with rhetoric and traditional Roman religious observance.

docs.title: Letter 2081
docs.author: Quintus Aurelius Symmachus
docs.subject_summary:
Commendatum mihi a fratre meo Hilario virum devotissimum Titianum quo alio 
possum beneficio munerari, quam ut eum sancto pectori tuo non aspemandus precator 
insinuem? et spero petitioni meae cessura
docs.excerpt: … A brief commendation of the devoted Titianus, referred by Symmachus's brother Hilarius. Our brother Hilarius has commended the most devoted Titianus to me. With what better recommendation could I pass him along to you?
